final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for cross-border e-commerce promotion (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "促销海报" aesthetic with layered typography and visual complexity — references in the spirit of 2010s Tumblr maximalist poster culture, Japanese デザイン誌 (design magazine) cover tradition, contemporary 电商大促 visual language; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, must include artistic typography with stacked/layered fonts, must include a product or main subject partially overlapping/obscuring some text, must balance complexity without visual clutter
Subject: must include a product or promotional subject as the focal element
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve artistic typography treatment, font stacking/layering, 16:9 aspect ratio, product-subject overlapping text effect, complex but non-cluttered composition
Avoid:
